name: Lyman-alpha forest constraints on small-scale matter power
requirement: Any candidate framework must reproduce the observed small-scale matter power spectrum P(k) at k ~ 1-10 h/Mpc as inferred from the Lyman-alpha forest of high-z quasars (z ~ 2-5). The data probe the smallest scales constrained by cosmological observations and rule out warm-dark-matter masses below ~5.3 keV (thermal-relic equivalent, 95% CL).

regime.description: Mpc-scale density fluctuations imprinted on the inter-galactic medium hydrogen at z = 2-5.

current_bound.value: m_WDM > 5.3 keV (thermal-relic-equivalent, 95% CL); equivalent fuzzy-DM mass m_FDM > 2 x 10^-21 eV
current_bound.reference: Irsic et al., 'New Constraints on the free-streaming of warm dark matter from intermediate and small scale Lyman-alpha forest data', PRD 96, 023522 (2017), arXiv:1702.01764

what_it_excludes: Excludes warm-dark-matter scenarios with m < 5 keV thermal-relic equivalent, including most sterile-neutrino dark matter produced via Dodelson-Widrow oscillations. Constrains fuzzy / ultralight dark matter masses below ~10^-21 eV. Forces any successful DM candidate to behave essentially like CDM down to galaxy scales.

parameterization.name: Suppression of the linear matter power spectrum on small scales: P(k) -> T(k)^2 P_CDM(k), with transfer function T(k) parameterized by a free-streaming or de Broglie scale k_FS or k_dB.
parameterization.reference: Viel, Becker, Bolton, Haehnelt, PRD 88, 043502 (2013); Hui, Ostriker, Tremaine, Witten, PRD 95, 043541 (2017) (FDM).
parameterization.summary: Hydrodynamic simulations + flux-power-spectrum modeling extract Plinear(k); compared to framework's prediction.

procedural.predicted_observable: 1D flux power spectrum P_F(k) of Lyman-alpha forest; deconvolved into linear matter power via simulations.
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: T(k = 10 h/Mpc) > 0.6, equivalently DM with free-streaming length < ~Mpc.
framework_inputs: Compute the framework's linear matter power spectrum at small scales, including any new free-streaming or wave-like behavior.
Hydrodynamic-simulation comparison required for absolute predictions; a framework provides P_lin(k), and existing simulations propagate to P_F(k).

primary_references.citation: Irsic et al., 'New Constraints on the free-streaming of warm dark matter from intermediate and small scale Lyman-alpha forest data', PRD 96, 023522 (2017)
Rogers and Peiris, 'Strong Bound on Canonical Ultralight Axion Dark Matter from the Lyman-Alpha Forest', PRL 126, 071302 (2021)
